title: hornof.org
blurb: This site. Rebuilt from a Dotster one-pager into a modern static site by an agentic engineering loop — each feature specced, tested, and shipped as its own reviewed pull request.

build.stack: Plain HTML · one style.css · vanilla JS · Cloudflare Pages
build.firstPassGreen: mostly — human review caught the rest
build.costNote: Tests written before code; every feature landed as its own reviewed PR, none straight to main.
